summary: Iteration 16 - BookingPage CMS Integration and WebsiteAdminPage Upload Button Fix Tests. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly via Playwright UI tests.

issues: Service categories (service_categories) array is empty in CMS - 'Mostra listino' section shows no categories. This may be intentional or needs CMS data to be populated.

critical_code_review_comments: BookingPage correctly fetches CMS data from /api/public/website in fetchData()
getImageUrl helper properly handles both absolute URLs and relative paths
Gallery filtering by section (salon/gallery) works correctly: salonPhotos and hairstylePhotos derived from siteData.gallery
Contact info reads from CMS config (address, phones, email, hours) with fallback defaults
WebsiteAdminPage upload button z-index fix verified: z-10 class present on file inputs
Upload button in Foto Salone and Gallery Lavori tabs is visible and positioned correctly
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing CMS data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BookingPage (/prenota) now dynamically loads CMS data from /api/public/website. Key data sources: config (service_categories, contact info, about text), reviews, gallery (filtered by section). WebsiteAdminPage upload button z-index fix verified - z-10 class on file inputs makes them clickable. Current CMS state: 4 salon photos exist, service_categories array is empty, reviews array is empty.

booking_page_cms_integration.public_website_api: PASS - Returns config, reviews, gallery, services
booking_page_cms_integration.logo_display: PASS - Logo shown in hero section (/logo.png?v=4)
booking_page_cms_integration.salon_gallery_section: PASS - Shows 4 salon photos from CMS gallery (section='salon')
booking_page_cms_integration.contact_info: PASS - Address, phones, email, hours from CMS config
booking_page_cms_integration.services_section: INFO - service_categories empty in CMS, shows 'Nascondi listino' toggle
booking_page_cms_integration.reviews_section: INFO - No reviews in CMS, section hidden when empty
booking_page_cms_integration.booking_flow: PASS - Services from API (20 services), step navigation works

website_admin_page.tabs: PASS - 6 tabs: Generale, Servizi, Foto Salone, Gallery Lavori, Recensioni, Orari & Contatti
website_admin_page.foto_salone_upload: PASS - 'Carica Foto' button visible, z-10 class confirmed on file input
website_admin_page.gallery_lavori_upload: PASS - 'Carica Foto' button visible, z-10 class confirmed
website_admin_page.recensioni_tab: PASS - Shows empty state with '+ Aggiungi' button

backend_apis.public_website: PASS - GET /api/public/website returns full CMS data
backend_apis.website_upload: PASS - POST /api/website/upload requires auth (401 without token)
